frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial setup, gauze properly tensioned, circular cutting line clearly visible

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean initial entry, cutting appears to follow marked line closely

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Continued precision, no visible deviations from cutting line

frame_analyses.description: Task appears completed with circular piece cut out, gauze still suspended

penalties.description: Minor deviation from cutting line at approximately 3 o'clock position
Slight deviation from cutting line at approximately 9 o'clock position

confidence_rationale: Good visibility of cutting line and gauze throughout most of procedure. Some uncertainty in exact deviation measurements due to camera angle and lighting variations.
cannot_determine: Exact mm measurements at 1:30 and 4:30 positions - partially obscured by instrument shadows
Northeast and northwest quadrant deviations - viewing angle limitations
technique_summary: Solid intermediate performance with steady cutting technique and good adherence to marked line. Minor deviations at lateral positions but overall clean execution.
strengths: Consistent cutting speed and control throughout procedure
Maintained gauze tension and clamp attachment
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining perpendicular cutting angle at lateral positions
Consider slower pace through challenging curve sections to improve precision
